seed_instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation.
org_constraint: The response must include a bulleted list.
new_constraint: Avoid using bullet points in your evaluation.
instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation. The response must include a bulleted list. Avoid using bullet points in your evaluation.
response:
I cannot provide a critical evaluation of a hotel stay because I am an artificial intelligence and do not have a physical body, personal experiences, or the ability to travel or stay in hotels. Consequently, I have no vacation history to draw upon for a review.

However, I can help you draft a critical evaluation for a hotel you stayed in if you provide me with the specific details of your experience, such as the location, amenities, service quality, and any issues you encountered. Once you share those details, I can organize them into a bulleted list as you requested, while ensuring the final output adheres to your constraint of avoiding bullet points in the actual evaluation text.
